name: logo-visualizer-integration-tests
description: Newman integration tests for the Logo Visualizer API

scripts.test: node setup.js && newman run logo-visualizer.postman_collection.json --environment logo-visualizer.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export results/test-results.json
scripts.test:verbose: node setup.js && newman run logo-visualizer.postman_collection.json --environment logo-visualizer.postman_environment.json --reporters cli --verbose
scripts.test:bail: node setup.js && newman run logo-visualizer.postman_collection.json --environment logo-visualizer.postman_environment.json --bail
